title: Forms Post-Publish Critical Actions Modal
summary: Testing a full-page modal for critical post-publish actions (embed code, tracking setup) to increase integration completion rates, inspired by successful flows experiment.
hypothesis: By moving critical post-publish actions (copying embed code, enabling onsite tracking) from small popups and sidebar alerts into a prominent full-page modal, we expect to replicate the flows post-publish experiment success and increase the rate at which users complete necessary integration steps to display their forms.
notes: Experiment will run for 30 days. Inspired by previous flows post-publish experiment success. PRD: https://docs.google.com/document/d/12V8mMPBOQAnN6C8bGza-T-MEjZRSX-RO72MzpAZ2-fY/edit?tab=t.7w4c7zqzj7v9#heading=h.p1agqd7gfjzp
control_description: Current UI with critical post-publish actions in small popups and hidden sidebar alerts
treatment_description: Full-page modal presenting critical next steps (embed div copy for embedded forms, onsite tracking enablement) prominently after first form publish
source_id: Update TFN Registration Form to Include Buisness EIN
